visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) Indoor Costco supermarket warehouse. A young woman with long black hair, wearing a thick gray coat, stands next to a massive stack of red and orange cardboard boxes containing Cadina potato chips. She smiles and touches the boxes while gesturing towards them. (2) Close-up shots focusing on the packaging of the potato chips. The boxes feature the Cadina logo and images of thick-cut chips. High-angle shots show the price tag of $299 on the shelf. (3) Transition to an indoor home environment, likely a kitchen or living area with neutral lighting. The first woman is now seen from the waist up, joined by a second woman wearing a black beret. They are holding small individual bags of the chips and demonstrating their thickness by holding single chips up to the camera. (4) Close-up macro shots of the potato chips to emphasize their texture and thickness. The women are seen eating the chips with exaggerated expressions of satisfaction and nodding. Various variety-show style text overlays and emojis appear dynamically on the screen during the tasting.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Subtitle]: 你在拿什麼. [Slogan]: 必買話題新品. (2) [Slogan]: 卡迪娜 黃金薯片. [Subtitle]: 黃金薯片. [Subtitle]: 小朋友你為什麼要拿這個. (3) [Subtitle]: 台農1號馬鈴薯. [Slogan]: 台農1號馬鈴薯. (4) [Subtitle]: 你最近很愛吃餅乾哦. [Subtitle]: 好那我們試試看好不好吃. [Slogan]: 看起來就超讚. (5) [Slogan]: 小包裝黃金薯片. [Subtitle]: 哈哈哈 小朋友愛吃餅乾. [Subtitle]: 你也會吃啊. [Subtitle]: 對我也會吃. (6) [Subtitle]: 這個要不要 豌豆脆片. [Logo]: Cadina. [Subtitle]: 夠了 只能選一個. (7) [Slogan]: 卡迪娜最新黃金薯片. [Subtitle]: 299元一箱 然後總共有10包. [Subtitle]: 所以每一包是30塊. (8) [Subtitle]: 它裡面呢 有非常厚的這種薯片. [Subtitle]: 這是我看過最厚的. [Subtitle]: 你看它的厚度是非常的有喔. (9) [Subtitle]: 吃起來也很脆 然後不會很油. [Subtitle]: 吃起來很接近 馬鈴薯本身的香氣. (10) [Slogan]: 馬鈴薯本身的香氣. [Subtitle]: 好好吃. [Subtitle]: 真的是每一片都吃得到濃濃薯香. (11) [Subtitle]: 它沒有做過多的調味跟過多的去油炸它. [Subtitle]: 口感很好 非常的涮嘴. (12) [Subtitle]: 加上他是添加喜馬拉雅玫瑰鹽. [Slogan]: 喜馬拉雅玫瑰鹽. [Subtitle]: 吃起來鹹度卻不會很高. (13) [Subtitle]: 非常的上癮 讓人一口接一口. [Subtitle]: 好好吃喔 喜歡.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: Two main female creators appearing throughout the promotion.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman with long black hair in a gray coat (store) and black top (home); another woman with a black beret and dark hair (home).

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Starts in a warehouse-style supermarket (Costco) with high metal shelves; shifts to a clean, brightly lit domestic indoor setting.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-arousal female voice begins the sequence with an enthusiastic greeting and a question about the product. Background music is a mid-tempo, upbeat pop track featuring acoustic guitar strumming and a light electronic drum beat. (2) A sharp 'Ding' sound effect accompanies the visual transition to the product's price. The sound of plastic rustling is audible as a snack box is moved. The vocal delivery remains fast-paced and cheerful. (3) Two female voices begin an interactive dialogue with high pitch variability. The acoustic texture is dominated by clean speech layered over the consistent music bed. A distinct, percussive 'crunch' sound effect is heard as they bite into the potato chips. (4) Digital 'Whoosh' and 'Pop' sound effects are used as transitions between close-up shots of the food. The background music remains steady in tempo (120 BPM) with a positive major-mode feel. (5) The sequence concludes with higher vocal intensity as they express appreciation ('Mmm', 'Delicious'). The music maintains its volume until a quick fade-out at the very end.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook (Costco discovery) -> Detail (Price and packaging) -> Evaluation (Thickness and texture) -> Experience (Taste test) -> Conclusion (Emotional endorsement).
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote the Cadina Golden Potato Chips available at Costco by highlighting their value (quantity/price ratio) and unique physical attributes (thickness and lack of greasiness) through an energetic, relatable vlog-style review.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of brand logos (Costco, Cadina), explicit price breakdown, and focused product attribute highlights.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A highly produced social-native advertisement utilizing variety-show editing techniques to drive consumer interest in a specific retail snack product.
